title: case_result
description: One per-case marathon record appended to world.results.items by record_case.star.

exit.description: The inner pipeline's terminal exit (shipped | needs-human | not-reproducible | abandoned | skipped).

verify_status.description: The INDEPENDENT oracle outcome — the grade (never the maker's self-report).

verify_how.description: How the independent verify was performed.

trace.description: Path to the drive's trace (cost/token evidence).
